tasks.subject: Fix stale .opencode/ paths in 2 skills
tasks.description: Update .pi/skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md lines 27, 57, 58 and .pi/skills/subagent-driven-development/SKILL.md line 35 to use .pi/ paths instead of .opencode/ paths.

tasks.subject: Add .env.example and VERSION files
tasks.description: Create .pi/.env.example listing kit-relevant env vars (currently none required). Create .pi/VERSION (e.g., 0.2.0) for kit self-identification.

tasks.subject: Document pi-guard configuration
tasks.description: Create .pi/guard.example.json or document pi-guard config inline in AGENTS.md/README. Show default ruleset, how to extend, and what the kit's convention is.

tasks.subject: Restore review agent content (36 LOC)
tasks.description: Restore ~36 LOC of review agent expertise from .opencode/agent/review.md to .pi/agents/review.md: triage criteria, stub-detection patterns (Component→API→DB), strict JSON schema, severity-ordered output structure, examples.

tasks.subject: Restore scout agent content (24 LOC)
tasks.description: Restore ~24 LOC of scout agent content: source-quality hierarchy table (Official docs > Source > Maintainer > Community), Workflow section with parallel-call strategy, "Never refer to tools by name" rule.

tasks.subject: Restore vision agent content (52 LOC)
tasks.description: Restore ~52 LOC of vision agent content: DESIGN.md protocol, Figma-first workflow, brand extraction workflow, design taste variants list, anti-slop protocol, design QA checklist.

tasks.subject: Restore init.md observation() call
tasks.description: Restore observation() LTM persistence call in .pi/prompts/init.md so project-init events hit long-term memory.

tasks.subject: Restore ship.md parallel batch syntax
tasks.description: Restore parallel-subagent batch TS syntax in .pi/prompts/ship.md. Pi supports parallel subagent calls natively, leverage it for the Standard Review Mode's 5 parallel agent task list.

tasks.subject: Restore create.md subagent blocks
tasks.description: Restore task() TS-form blocks (subagent calls) in .pi/prompts/create.md. ~20 LOC restoration.

tasks.subject: Port 4 example artifact templates
tasks.description: Port 4 example artifact templates from .opencode/artifacts/example/ (plan.md, progress.md, research.md, spec.md) to .pi/artifacts/example/.

tasks.subject: Add slim gc-check.sh script
tasks.description: Create .pi/scripts/gc-check.sh (~30 LOC) for cross-extension import boundary check, then update .pi/prompts/gc.md to invoke it.

tasks.subject: Archive mapping-compact.md to .pi/artifacts/history/
tasks.description: Move .opencode/artifacts/mapping-compact.md to .pi/artifacts/history/mapping-compact.md to preserve migration history.

tasks.subject: Update README to reflect final extension set
tasks.description: Update .pi/README.md to reflect the final extension set (4 custom + 2 external packages), document removed extensions (commands-dispatcher, dcp-strategies, pi-guard, skill-mcp), and update the architecture diagram.
